# GitHub Copilot Instructions - spigolo.net

## Project: spigolo.net
Spigolo.net website

Part of ClawMedia Digital agency swarm (migar-git).
Language: HTML | Type: website

## Conventions
- Semantic HTML5, accessible, mobile-responsive

## Security
- Never commit secrets, API keys, tokens
- All timestamps UTC ISO 8601

## Agent Infrastructure
- codex.md - Agentic coding protocol (read first)
- AGENT.md - Authority manifest
- AGENTS.md - Swarm assignment
- agents/ commands/ rules/ skills/ - Agent directories
